queue_item.action: Separate browser-visible audio output routing evidence from rendering, physical output, and human audibility.

progress.finding: A fulfilled setSinkId request with matching observed sinkId and enumerated audiooutput membership can attest browser-bound non-default routing, but cannot prove continuing device availability, acoustic output, or human audibility. Empty sinkId identifies only the user-agent default route.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should append route evidence to the existing activation, AudioContext, render-timeline, and human-outcome packet. Unsupported routing APIs and default-route observations must remain explicit classifications. A browser-bound route must never be promoted to physical-output or heard evidence.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Additive team-owned record only. Do not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json until the queue promotion gate reconciles stale canonical state.
